metadata.thoughts:
**Setting service parameters**

I need to set the location type to "REGIONAL" and the location codes to ["15"]. 

The text mentions guaranteed times from 08:20 to 12:20 for four hours during a strike. It seems we only need this single time range, so I’ll include ["08:20-12:20"] as our guarantee since there aren't any additional times specified throughout the day. The instructions say to include null if there are no guarantees, but in this case, we have a clear time frame to work with.
